utf8_capabilities_t(3) Library Functions Manual utf8_capabilities_t(3)

NAME

utf8_capabilities_t - UTF-8 capability detection structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/palette.h>

Data Fields


bool utf8_support
True if terminal supports UTF-8 (detected automatically). bool forced_utf8
True if user forced UTF-8 via --utf8 flag. char terminal_type [32]
$TERM environment variable value (for detection) char locale_encoding [16]
Current locale encoding (e.g., UTF-8").

Detailed Description

UTF-8 capability detection structure.

Stores information about terminal UTF-8 support, including detection results and terminal environment information.

Definition at line 137 of file palette.h.

Author

Version 0.9.8 ascii-chat
